╰── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──╯

「 "It's alright, I just need you stay still for me." First Aid felt stupid, talking to something that wasn't supposed to understand, but it was a habit he'd picked up tending to patients. He stepped up behind the medi-drone, servos gliding down it's plating and between its legs. A skillful curl of his digits had its modesty panels opening involuntarily, he had no idea who had thought to equip service drones with an array, but it made him feel slightly at ease for how he took advantage of it. 」
